rulings.Case Title: ANA MACDONALD VS. DUKE PARTNERS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Resposnes To Form Interrogatories, Set One And Special Interrogatories, Set One
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday June 8, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One And Special Interrogatories, Set One GRANTED in full and plaintiff is ordered to produce responses within ten (10) days of the date of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $1,435.00. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PRIYA SANGER ET AL VS. AHE AHN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Ahe Ahn For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday June 8, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT AHE AHN Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Ahe Ahn For Judgment On The Pleadings DENIED. Injury is a factual determination and principles of res judicata do not preclude Plaintiffs from a bringing a claim. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday June 8, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANT LEONG MING DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, moot. First Amended Complaint filed on May 11, 2018. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MILA POPOV VS. MELINA C. JONES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday June 8, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT MELINA JONES, KAHLIEL JONES DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. The 90-Day Notice to Quit failed to contain language as required by SF Rent Ordinance section 37.9(i)(4). Plaintiff failed to address this issue in her opposition. Whether Plaintiff notified the Rent Board is a factual dispute. = (501/CFH)
